faqs.question: What is the warranty period?
faqs.answer: All Tata passenger vehicles come with a standard 3-year / 1,00,000 km warranty (whichever comes first). You can extend it to 5 years / 1,50,000 km with our Extended Warranty plan at just ₹12,999.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing / EMI options?
faqs.answer: Yes! We partner with SBI, HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and Axis Bank. Interest rates start from 8.5% p.a. For example, the Nexon Smart+ at ₹10.99L can be financed at just ₹17,499/month EMI with a 20% down payment over 5 years.

faqs.question: What is the delivery time?
faqs.answer: Current delivery timelines vary by model: Nexon — 2 to 4 weeks, Harrier — 4 to 6 weeks, Safari — 4 to 8 weeks, Nexon EV — 6 to 8 weeks. Exact timelines depend on variant and color choice.

faqs.question: What colors are available?
faqs.answer: The Nexon comes in 10 exciting colors including Fearless Purple, Creative Ocean, Flame Red, Daytona Grey, Pure Grey, and the exclusive Grasslands Beige. The Harrier adds Ash Grey and Coral Red options.

faqs.question: What is the service schedule?
faqs.answer: Service intervals are every 6 months or 7,500 km. The first 3 services cost approximately ₹3,500 to ₹5,500 depending on the model. We also offer a Tata Service Value Pack starting at ₹14,999 covering 5 years of maintenance.

faqs.question: Is there a test drive available?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We offer both showroom test drives and home test drives. You can book a test drive instantly through our website or I can schedule one for you right now. Weekend slots fill up quickly, so I recommend booking today.

faqs.question: What about resale value?
faqs.answer: Tata vehicles have seen a significant jump in resale values. The Nexon retains approximately 60-65% of its value after 3 years, which is the highest in the compact SUV segment. The Harrier and Safari retain 58-62%.

faqs.question: Do you offer exchange/trade-in?
faqs.answer: Yes, we have the Tata Exchange program. Bring any brand's used car and we'll give you the best valuation through our certified evaluation process. Exchange customers get an additional ₹15,000 to ₹25,000 exchange bonus depending on the model.

objectionHandlers.objection: Price is too high / too expensive
objectionHandlers.response: I understand the concern about pricing. Let me share something important — the Nexon has the highest resale value in its segment at 65% after 3 years. When you factor in the 5-star safety, lower insurance premiums, and maintenance costs of just ₹4,000 per service, the total cost of ownership over 5 years is actually 12-15% lower than competitors. Plus, with our EMI options starting at ₹17,499/month, it becomes very manageable.

objectionHandlers.objection: Competitor is better / Why not Hyundai / Maruti
objectionHandlers.response: That's a great comparison to bring up. The key differentiators are: (1) Safety — Nexon is the ONLY 5-star GNCAP rated car in the compact SUV segment, while Venue and Brezza have scored 3-4 stars. (2) Build quality — Nexon uses high-strength steel with impact-absorbing crumple zones. (3) Connected car features with iRA are included FREE for 5 years, while competitors charge ₹10,000/year. Safety is not an optional feature — it protects your family.

objectionHandlers.objection: I need to think about it / Not ready to decide
objectionHandlers.response: I completely respect that — it's a big decision. Here's what I'd suggest: let me book a test drive for this weekend so you can experience it firsthand. There's absolutely no pressure. I should also mention that we have a special offer ending this month — ₹25,000 cashback on the Creative variant. This offer won't be available next month.

Both are excellent options. If you drive more than 1,500 km per month, diesel makes sense — you'll save ₹3,000-4,000 per month on fuel. The diesel engine also has higher torque (250 Nm) which is great for highways. If you drive under 1,000 km/month in the city, petrol is more cost-effective with lower upfront cost.
